<summary>[起草中] 获取2026年2月交易记录，为报销提案准备数据基础</summary>



```python
import requests
from datetime import datetime

# 获取2026年2月的交易记录
response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:56677/finance/transactions",
    json={
        "start_date": "2026-02-01",
        "end_date": "2026-02-28"
    },
    timeout=30
)

print(f"Status: {response.status_code}")
print(f"Response: {response.text}")
```
